prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科主榜参考中国石油大学（北京）约第62名（ 2026年），克拉玛依校区为分校区，层次定位与主校区一致；声誉文件中无该校显著负面或正面舆情记录；抖音热度排名中未进入前106名，关注度一般；未见 投档断档记录，整体舆情平稳；石油与天然气工程为该校核心优势学科（第四轮学科评估A+），化学工程与技术、地质资源与地质工程等亦为传统强项；招生专 业中石油工程、油气储运工程、资源勘查工程等直接对应优势学科。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、自动化、电气工程等专业社会热度高热推荐；石油工程等传统工科热度平 稳；本省2026年考生总数约120万（含不确定标记），较2025年物理类55.5万大幅增加，竞争显著加剧；学校位于新疆克拉玛依 市，距河南较远，地域偏好可能抑制部分考生报考意愿；该校在河南招生占比逐年提升（2025年约221人），属省外招生大户。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次57947、2026 年扩招约13.1%（按供需弹性计算位次后移约4561名）、本省考生总数大幅增加（竞争加剧）以及地域偏远（抑制部分报考）等多重因素，预计2026年物理类最低位次在2025年基 础上继续后移；预测最低位次约62709名，区间62209–63209名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 50842 → 47459 → 64505 → 43459 → 57947, with significant fluctuations. In 2023, due to batch merging, there was a notable backward shift (64505), recovering to 43459 in 2024, then shifting backward again to 57947 in 2025, showing a backward trend in recent two years, with a baseline of about 57947 in 2025. The provincial Physics Category enrollment plan was 125 in 2021, 144 in 2022, 148 in 2023, 210 in 2024, and 221 in 2025, with continuous expansion. The 2026 plan is 250, an increase of about 13.1% compared to 2025, with a significant increase in enrollment quotas, intensifying competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class university; on the Soft Science main ranking, reference China University of Petroleum (Beijing) at approximately 62nd (2026), with the Karamay Campus as a branch campus, maintaining the same level positioning as the main campus. The reputation file shows no significant negative or positive public records for this university; on Douyin popularity ranking, it did not enter the top 106, with average attention; no records of enrollment gaps, overall public sentiment stable. Petroleum and Natural Gas Engineering is the core advantageous discipline (A+ in the fourth round of discipline evaluation), with Chemical Engineering and Technology, Geological Resources and Geological Engineering also being traditional strengths. Among enrollment majors, Petroleum Engineering, Oil and Gas Storage and Transportation Engineering, Resource Exploration Engineering, etc., directly correspond to advantageous disciplines.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Automation, Electrical Engineering are highly popular and recommended; traditional engineering majors like Petroleum Engineering have stable popularity. The total number of candidates in the province for 2026 is about 1.2 million (including uncertain marks), a significant increase compared to the 555,000 Physics Category candidates in 2025, intensifying competition. The university is located in Karamay City, Xinjiang, far from Henan, and regional preferences may suppress some candidates' willingness to apply. The university's enrollment proportion in Henan has been increasing year by year (about 221 in 2025), making it a major out-of-province enrollment institution.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 57947, the 2026 enrollment expansion of about 13.1% (with a ranking backward shift of about 4561 based on supply-demand elasticity), the significant increase in the total number of candidates in the province (intensifying competition), and the remote location (suppressing some applications), it is expected that the minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 will continue to shift backward from the 2025 baseline. The predicted minimum ranking is about 62709, with a range of 62209–63209.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 62209–63209, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors such as Petroleum Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, and New Energy, with Tier 1 majors like Computer Science and Automation as reach options, and Tier 3 majors like Chemical Engineering and Resource Exploration as safety options. For rankings significantly better than the lower limit (<62209), focus on reaching for Tier 1 popular majors. For rankings near the upper limit (>63209), it is recommended to mainly rely on Tier 3 safety options.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category was approximately 9192 → 9039 → 7755 → 7718 → 8282, showing an overall forward trend (from 9192 to 7718 from 2021 to 2024), with a slight backward shift to 8282 in 2025, and a baseline of about 8282 in 2025; the provincial enrollment plan for History Category was 19 in 2021, 25 in 2022, 25 in 2023, 29 in 2024, and 28 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 23, a reduction of about 17.9% compared to 2025, with fewer enrollment slots, slightly easing competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; on the Soft Science main ranking, China University of Petroleum (Beijing) is approximately 62nd (2026), with the Karamay Campus as a branch campus, maintaining the same level positioning as the main campus; the university is primarily science and engineering, and the History Category enrollment majors (Economics, Accounting, Chinese Language and Literature, English, Russian, Ideological and Political Education, etc.) do not directly correspond to the dominant petroleum disciplines, with weak disciplinary evaluation support; there are no significant negative or positive public opinion records in the reputation file; it did not enter the top 106 in Douyin popularity rankings, with average attention; no record of admission cutoff gaps, overall public opinion stable.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Economics/Finance social popularity is divided and wait-and-see, Accounting is recommended, Chinese Language and Literature is recommended, foreign languages are generally wait-and-see; the total number of provincial examinees in 2026 is about 1.2 million (including uncertain marks), a significant increase from the 352,000 History Category examinees in 2025, sharply intensifying competition; the university is located in Karamay, Xinjiang, far from Henan, and regional preferences may suppress some candidates' willingness to apply; the History Category enrollment is small (23), making it a niche out-of-province choice.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering multiple factors such as the 2025 baseline ranking of 8282, the 2026 enrollment reduction of about 17.9% (with a ranking forward shift of about 887 based on supply-demand elasticity), and the significant increase in the total number of provincial examinees (intensified competition), the competition relief effect from enrollment reduction and the competition intensification effect from increased examinees partially offset each other; the predicted minimum ranking is about 7345, with a range of 6845–7845.
